_README: Product catalogue. Prices in AED (Selling Price). Colours lists confirmed variants — empty means colour is subject to stock/TBC; verifier skips the colour check when colours is empty. Status: confirmed = verified against real order; active = live product, colour/stock pending confirmation; imported = sourced product, colour TBC from real photo.
